name: Divine Hollandaise
recipeInstructions:
1. Add saffron successfully to any hollandaise recipe.
2. Steep the saffron threads in hot water for 20 minutes.
3. Cook the egg yolks and saffron together in a double boiler over low heat until thickened, stirring constantly.
4. When the mixture is thickened, begin adding butter pieces one at a time, incorporating each piece before adding another.
5. Add lemon juice and keep warm in a pan of water until ready to serve.
